summary: EXP-481 introduces {{DOME_CONFIRMED_HEADLINE}} placeholder (sourced from data/uncounted-failures.json:dome_claimed_confirmed, new field defaulting to 69) and proposes 14 prose patches replacing bare 69 references to the dome's published confirmed-predictions headline. Six classes of bare-69 are explicitly enumerated as STAY literal (historical V51.0 reference, verbatim snapshot quotes, σ-value decimals, anchor IDs, the three-number registry breakdown, the ts-april-2026-update build-scripts/generate-html.js prose). Build pipeline changes: 1 schema addition (uncounted-failures.json) + 4 generate-html.js edits + 1 _meta.placeholders entry. Tests recommended (regression grep, placeholder resolution, drift detector). Class: deep-attack — schema choice and mentions_left_unchanged enumeration are both adversarial-attack-worthy.
